texto: To have a man whose name is on the label showing such interest, commitment, and determination for the best is a wonderful thing. This is someone who will throw money at quality, who believes in being the best. Never knock it. Would you prefer to have a bean counter in corporate headquarters, someone who never comes near the brewery, making decisions solely on the basis of the bottom line and profit margins?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Charles W. Bamforth que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “To have a man whose name is on the label showing such interest, commitment, and determination for…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre negocios, beer, commitment, com foco em commitment e corporate-ethics.
